RenaultConfigFinished.comment: Define if the radar is configured or not. By default, this value is equal to 0.This DID is the last

MPU_HMI.comment: HMI for activation or deactivation of MPU settings

Alignment_State.comment: Alignment state of the radar at each trip start

RawSensor.comment: Driver pushing rate on gaz pedal

AEB_BrakeTorqueGain.comment: Value of the braking gain applied on the driver braking.

V_m_DistanceObject00.comment: Distance between Object 0 and host vehicle

F_x_DW_Failure.comment: Flag true if DW is in Failure

VDC_Flag.CRC_VDC_A10_OK.comment: Flag true if checksum error is detected on frame VDC_A10

VDC_Flag.CRC_VDC_A3_OK.comment: Flag true if checksum error is detected on frame VDC_A3

VDC_Flag.CRC_VDC_A6_OK.comment: Flag true if checksum error is detected on frame VDC_A6

VDC_Flag.Clock_VDC_A10_Frozen.comment: Flag true if frozen clock error is detected on frame VDC_A10

VDC_Flag.Clock_VDC_A3_Frozen.comment: Flag true if frozen clock error is detected on frame VDC_A3

VDC_Flag.Clock_VDC_A6_Frozen.comment: Flag true if frozen clock error is detected on frame VDC_A6

VehicleSpeedFlag.CRC_OK.comment: Flag true if checksum error is detected on frame VDC_A9

VehicleSpeedFlag.Clock_Frozen.comment: Flag true if frozen clock error is detected on frame VDC_A9

DTCFormatIdentifier.comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

MCC.Confidence_Level.comment: Confidence level of the cyclist for a AEBS target

MCC.Life_Time.comment: Time since the object has been defined as the MCC

MCC.Vxcyc_rel.comment: Cyclist longitudinal velocity relative to host predicted path.

MCC.Vycyc_rel.comment: Cyclist lateral velocity relative to host predicted path.

MCC.Xcyc_rel.comment: Cyclist longitudinal distance relative to host predicted path. Reference point, mid centre bumper.

MCC.Ycyc_rel.comment: Pedestrian relative position to the host vehicle for MCP

MCP.Confidence_Level.comment: Confidence level of the pedestrian for a AEBS target

MCP.Life_Time.comment: Time since the object has been defined as the MCP

MCP.Vxped_rel.comment: Pedestrian longitudinal velocity relative to host predicted path.

MCP.Vyped_rel.comment: Pedestrian lateral velocity relative to host predicted path.

MCP.Xped_rel.comment: Pedestrian longitudinal distance relative to host predicted path. Reference point, mid centre bumper

MCP.Yped_rel.comment: Pedestrian relative position to the host vehicle for MCP

MCV.Confidence.comment: Confidence level of the car for a AEBS target

MCV.Cor_Lateral_Position.comment: lateral position of track (curve corrected) (positive = track on the right).

MCV.Lat_Speed.comment: Lateral speed of track (positive = track moving to the right).

MCV.Stationary_Object.comment: The object is not moving, and has never been seen moving in the past

MCV.Angle.comment: Angle to track (not curve corrected) (positive = track on the right).

RWS.Checksum_OK.comment: Flag true if checksum error is detected on frame FWS_R1

RWS.Clock_Frozen.comment: Flag true if frozen clock error is detected on frame FWS_R1

Param_veh_2.Steer_gear_ratio.comment: Gear between angle of steering wheel and steering angle

Param_veh_2.RPLB.comment:
"1 = Mounted with connector down (towards ground)
-1 = Mounted with connector up (towards sky)"

Safety_monitoring.P_sys_x_SwaClockCheckE.comment: Parameter allowing to enable  clock check.

Safety_monitoring.P_sys_x_SwaChecksumChe.comment: Parameter allowing to enable  checksum check.

Safety_monitoring.P_sys_x_BrakeControlR1.comment: Parameter allowing to enable  clock check.
Parameter allowing to enable  checksum check.

lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level out of range / zero adj. failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect
lists.151: Component or sys. operation obstructed or blocked

systemSupplierIdentifier.comment: Name and address information of the supplier.

Plant Alignment checking.Horizontal Alig.comment: Right is Positive, Left is NEGATIVE This is the current offset after RunTime

lists.3: 03: Not ready-System Failure and vehicle moving

lists.4: 04: Mirror kept in the same Position.

Plant Alignment checking.Vertical Alignm.comment: up is positive, down is negative This is the current offset after Run Time

CW_track.CW_angle.comment:
"angle to track (not curve corrected) (positive = track on the
right)"

CW_track.CW_lat_speed.comment: lateral speed of track (positive = track moving to the right)

CW_track.CW_stationary_object.comment:
"stationary object means not moving, and has never been seen
moving in the past.
0 = no stationary o

CW_track.CW_new_track.comment:
"f a new object is recognized this bit is set for two cycles
0 = no new track
1 = new track"

SessionName.comment: Diagnostic session values. See documentation for more information.

Param_veh_1.Wheel Base.comment: Longitudinal distance between the center of tire contact of pair of wheels on same vehicle side (Whe

Param_veh_1.Longitudinal_Displacement.comment: Longitudinal displacment related to vehicle center of gravity

Param_veh_1.Center_of_gravity_hgt.comment: Center of gravity height (Imaginary point where the total weight of the body may be thought to be co

Param_veh_1.AxisLoadDistr.comment: The ratio of the vertical load at rear axle to total vehicle vertical load

Param_veh_1.Sterring Ratio.comment: The ratio between steering wheel angle and the steer angle.

Param_veh_1.Lateral_displacement.comment: Lateral displacement related to vehicle reference point

Param_veh_1.WhlTcksPerRev.comment: Number of sensor pulses per wheel revolution

Param_veh_1.Overhang.comment: Longitudinal distance from the center of front axle group to the front most point

Param_veh_1.PitchAngle.comment: Angular displacement about sensor lateral axis (+ down)

Param_veh_1.RollAngle.comment: Angular displacement about sensor longitudinal axis

Param_veh_1.YawAngle.comment: Angular displacemnt about vehicle vertical axis

Param_veh_1.CoverDamping.comment: Attenuation of secondary surface (two-way) in dB

Param_Sensor.ElevationMountingPosRadarSe.comment: Elevation mounting position of radar sensor (distance to road plane)

Param_Sensor.LongiMountingPosRadarSensor.comment: Longitudinal mounting position of radar sensor (distance to rear axis)

Safety_monitoring.Private_CAN_Clock_enab.comment: Parameter allowing to enable  checksum check.
